entity.label: Jehdeiah

entity.description: A Meronothite, herdsman of the asses under David and Solomon (1 Chr. 27:30).

nodes.label: Jehdeiah
nodes.description: A Meronothite, herdsman of the asses under David and Solomon (1 Chr. 27:30).

verses.text: Over the camels also was Obil the Ishmaelite: and over the asses was Jehdeiah the Meronothite:
